fb_connections_delete
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM workspaces
  WHERE ((workspaces.id = fb_connections.workspace_id) AND (workspaces.owner_id = auth.uid()))))

policies.polname: fb_connections_insert
policies.check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM workspaces
  WHERE ((workspaces.id = fb_connections.workspace_id) AND (workspaces.owner_id = auth.uid()))))

policies.polname: fb_connections_select
policies.qual:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM workspaces
  WHERE ((workspaces.id = fb_connections.workspace_id) AND (workspaces.owner_id = auth.uid())))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM team_members
  WHERE ((team_members.workspace_id = fb_connections.workspace_id) AND (team_members.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (team_members.status = 'active'::text)))))

policies.polname: fb_connections_update
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM workspaces
  WHERE ((workspaces.id = fb_connections.workspace_id) AND (workspaces.owner_id = auth.uid()))))
